name: frontend-helper-pro
description: All-in-one VS Code extension for frontend developers: tag rename, spelling diagnostics, and CSS unit conversion.

commands.title: Frontend Helper Pro: Convert CSS Unit
Frontend Helper Pro: Restart Spell Check

frontendHelperPro.autoRename.languages.description: Language IDs where paired tag renaming is active.

frontendHelperPro.spellCheck.enabled.description: Enable spelling diagnostics for comments, strings, Markdown, and HTML text.

frontendHelperPro.spellCheck.languages.description: Language IDs where spelling diagnostics are active.

frontendHelperPro.spellCheck.dictionary.description: Workspace words that should be treated as correctly spelled.

frontendHelperPro.spellCheck.ignoreWords.description: Words to ignore in spelling diagnostics.

frontendHelperPro.spellCheck.flagWords.description: Words to always flag as spelling errors. Supports CSpell formats like "teh->the".

frontendHelperPro.spellCheck.locale.description: CSpell locale/language used for spell checking.

frontendHelperPro.spellCheck.maxDiagnost.description: Maximum number of spelling diagnostics per document.

frontendHelperPro.spellCheck.numSuggesti.description: Maximum number of spelling suggestions to generate per diagnostic.

frontendHelperPro.spellCheck.minWordLeng.description: Minimum word length checked by CSpell. Built-in flagged words can still be reported.

frontendHelperPro.cssUnit.enabled.description: Enable CSS unit conversion code actions and command.

frontendHelperPro.cssUnit.languages.description: Language IDs where CSS unit conversion is active.

frontendHelperPro.cssUnit.baseFontSize.description: Base font size used for px and rem conversions.

frontendHelperPro.cssUnit.viewportWidth.description: Viewport width in px used for vw and rpx conversions.

frontendHelperPro.cssUnit.rpxDesignWidth.description: Design width in rpx used for rpx conversions.

frontendHelperPro.cssUnit.precision.description: Maximum decimal places for generated unit conversions.

frontendHelperPro.cssUnit.completion.ena.description: Show CSS unit conversion suggestions while typing values such as 20px.

frontendHelperPro.cssUnit.completion.tar.description: Target units shown as typing suggestions. The default makes 16px suggest 1rem, 32rpx, and 4.2667vw.

frontendHelperPro.importCost.enabled.description: Show inline import cost annotations for package imports.

frontendHelperPro.importCost.languages.description: Language IDs where import cost annotations are active.

frontendHelperPro.importCost.showGzip.description: Show gzip size alongside minified import size.

frontendHelperPro.importCost.maxImports.description: Maximum number of imports to annotate per document.

frontendHelperPro.importCost.timeoutMs.description: Network timeout in milliseconds for import cost lookups.
